/bin/mv /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/usr/local/share/user_map.conf  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/usr/local/etc/mysql/user_map.conf.sample

/bin/rm -f -r /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/usr/local/share/mysql/policy  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/usr/local/include/mysql/server/private  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/usr/local/lib/mysql/pkgconfig  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/suite  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/usr/local/etc/mysql/init.d  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/usr/local/etc/mysql/logrotate.d  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/mysql/COPYING
/bin/mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/stage/var/log/mysql
/usr/bin/sed '/%%/d;/^@comment /d;s/^/@comment /' ../mariadb106-client/pkg-plist  >> /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb106-server/work/.PLIST.mktmp
